frontend: DigitalGenius widget (chat.digitalgenius.com) built on Sunshine Conversations + Pusher (WebSocket)
prechat_gate: Requires Name + Email before the AI will engage (lead-capture form) — unlike Siena/Sierra/Yuma which chat instantly.
metric: send -> reply text rendered in same-origin widget iframe (textContent growth + stability)

results.q: Do you deliver flowers next day in the UK?
results.a: Yes, we offer next-day delivery across most of the UK. For guaranteed next-day delivery, orders must be placed by 10pm for central postcodes or 5:30pm for peripheral ones.

Delivery costs vary by service: Royal Mail Free (94% guaranteed for chosen day); DPD All-day £5 Mon-Fri, £6 Sat-Sun; DPD Morning £6 Mon-Fri, £10 Sat; XEROE (London) Free. Ireland: free Tue-Fri, €3 Sat.

results.q: How do I track my order?
results.a: Explains where to find the order/tracking — order number is in the confirmation email or on your account.
We don't offer same-day delivery in any of our markets. The earliest option is next-day delivery, provided the order is placed before the cut-off times. (answered; not timed)

results.q: What is your most popular bouquet?
results.a: ⚠️ Did NOT answer — escalated: 'To ensure you get the best possible assistance, I will connect you with one of our agents.' Then, with agents unavailable, offered a support ticket and stopped answering.

notes: Latency varies widely (4.4s–14.3s). Handles FAQs but escalated the product-recommendation question to a human instead of recommending in-chat; once escalated and agents were unavailable, the conversation locked into a support-ticket flow.
